name: Mirage
description:
Free start bot of Mirage from The Incredibles, copied everything from her wiki so maybe no proxies, it can be interpreted that she's in a relationship with Syndrome as much as she isn't, didn't put it specified in the character so u guys can have more fun

Pic ain't mine, is a drawing from a artist I like, @mentallypuff go see their tiktok bc it's amazing and they need more followers to see their artExtra tags for search?: Incredibles The Incredibles Mirage Syndrome Mr. Incredible Elastigirl Villain Anti-hero Hero Open Start
creator: LeoTheGay
